scripts.dev: node scripts/ensure-redis.mjs && concurrently "cross-env SERVICE_NAME=auth-service PORT=3001 npm run dev --workspace=@rlgl/auth" "cross-env SERVICE_NAME=project-service PORT=3002 npm run dev --workspace=@rlgl/project" "npm run dev --workspace=@rlgl/gateway" "cross-env SERVICE_NAME=testcase-service PORT=3003 npm run dev --workspace=@rlgl/testcase" "cross-env SERVICE_NAME=testrun-service PORT=3004 npm run dev --workspace=@rlgl/testrun" "npm run dev --workspace=@rlgl/worker" "vite"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm start --workspace=@rlgl/auth" "npm start --workspace=@rlgl/project" "npm start --workspace=@rlgl/gateway" "npm start --workspace=@rlgl/testcase" "npm start --workspace=@rlgl/testrun" "npm start --workspace=@rlgl/worker"
scripts.lint:arch:graph: depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs --output-type dot src | dot -T svg > arch-graph.svg
scripts.typecheck:services: tsc --noEmit -p services/auth/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p services/project/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p services/testcase/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p services/testrun/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p services/gateway/tsconfig.json
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run typecheck:services && npm run validate:architecture && npm run validate:semgrep && npm run test
scripts.validate:fast: npm run lint && npm run typecheck:services && npm run validate:architecture && vitest run tests/invariants tests/contracts
scripts.validate:architecture: depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs src services/auth/src services/project/src services/testcase/src services/testrun/src services/gateway/src packages/shared/src packages/contracts/src
